LanguageData.JDG_CreatureSpawnReady: An umbral anchor is ready to summon a new creature
LanguageData.JDG_UnnaturalCorpseHarvest_Successful: Dark God be praised, the herald kept the corpse down and is blessed with productivity!
LanguageData.JDG_UnnaturalCorpseHarvest_Failure: This herald failed the Dark God. Blood stains both soil and sky, and it seems more is coming...
LanguageData.JDG_PerceptorDetectedMinorSecret: A perceptor revealed an embarrassing secret about {0}.
